known_limitations: llvm-mca RThroughput may disagree with benchmark on some kernels

Exact cycle counts require uops.info or local bench
trusted_on_this_arch: scenario flatten exposes more of powf_impl than M1 harness

pattern_lessons: x86 stack-serial FMA may appear as vfmadd consuming stack memory operand
Register pressure may track instruction count and stack spill pairs
